zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Boteler於1395年4月13日出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 維其可洛福阿可洛福時，他的父親James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond32歲，母親Anne Welles35歲。他於1410年8月28日與Lady Catharine O'Reilly在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1452年8月22日在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼吉拉阿莫利享年57歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Boteler于1395年4月13日出生在爱尔兰庫迪 維其可洛福阿可洛福时，他的父亲James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond32岁，母亲Anne Welles35岁。他于1410年8月28日与Lady Catharine O'Reilly在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1452年8月22日在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼吉拉阿莫利享年57岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Boteler was born on 13 April 1395, in Arklow, County Wicklow, Ireland, his father, James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond, was 32 and his mother, Anne Welles, was 35. He married Lady Catharine O'Reilly on 28 August 1410, in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 22 August 1452, in Killamery, County Kilkenny, Ireland, at the age of 57, and was buried in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Boteler est né le 13 avril 1395, à Arklow, County Wicklow, Irlande, son père, James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Anne Welles, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Lady Catharine O'Reilly le 28 août 1410, à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 22 août 1452, à Killamery, County Kilkenny, Irlande, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Boteler am 13. April 1395 in Arklow, County Wicklow, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond 32 und seine Mutter Anne Welles 35. Er hat am 28. August 1410 in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland Lady Catharine O'Reilly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 22. August 1452 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Killamery, County Kilkenny, Irland und wurde in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Boteler è nato il il 13 aprile 1395 nel Arklow, County Wicklow, Irlanda, il suo padre, James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Anne Welles, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Lady Catharine O'Reilly il 28 agosto 1410, nel Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 agosto 1452, nel Killamery, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Botelerが1395年4月13日にアイルランドコウントイ ウィックロウアルクロウで生まれた時，父James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormondは32歳，母Anne Wellesは35歳であった。1410年8月28日にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーでLady Catharine O'Reillyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1452年8月22日にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキラムリーで57歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Boteler(이)가 1395년 4월 13일 아일랜드 카운티 윅로 아클로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Welles(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1410년 8월 28일 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에서 Lady Catharine O'Reilly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1452년 8월 22일 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬램리에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에 묻혔다.

mn.13 April 1395–22 August 1452: 1395 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 13–1452 оны Наймдугаар сарын 22

pt.13 April 1395–22 August 1452: 13 de abril de 1395–22 de agosto de 1452
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Boteler nasceu em 13 de abril de 1395, em Arklow, County Wicklow, Irlanda, seu pai, James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Anne Welles, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Catharine O'Reilly em 28 de agosto de 1410, em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1452, em Killamery, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Boteler родился 13 апреля 1395 г. в местности арклоу, коунти викклоу, Ирландия, его отцу по имени James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Welles, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Catharine O'Reilly 28 августа 1410 г. в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 22 августа 1452 г. в местности киллэмири, коунти килкенни, Ирландия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия.

es.13 April 1395–22 August 1452: 13 de abril de 1395–22 de agosto de 1452
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Boteler nació el 13 de abril de 1395, en Arklow, County Wicklow, Irlanda, su papá, James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Anne Welles, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Lady Catharine O'Reilly el 28 de agosto de 1410, en Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1452, en Killamery, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.
